title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXVI. Riddles.
content:
[A Well.]

        As round as an apple, as deep as a cup,
        And all the king's horses can't pull it up.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXVI. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
